summary: Iteration 41 - Licensee Features Tests Complete. All 10 tests passed. Verified: 1) Licensees bypass Heartbeat membership verification on login (license_type check at line 643-644), 2) GET /api/profit/master-admin-trades returns master admin's trading status by date (licensees only - returns 403 for non-licensees), 3) Extended licensee Daily Projection table correctly hides 'Actual Profit' and 'P/L Diff' columns, 4) Extended licensee Daily Projection shows 'Profit Credited' column with checkmark/X icons based on master admin trading status.
critical_code_review_comments: Login heartbeat bypass (lines 641-651 in server.py): Correctly checks is_licensee = user.get('license_type') is not None and skips Heartbeat verification for licensees
master-admin-trades endpoint (lines 4518-4570 in server.py): Correctly restricts access to licensees only (returns 403 for non-licensees)
Frontend isExtendedLicensee/isHonoraryLicensee vars (lines 411-413 in ProfitTrackerPage.jsx): Correctly derived from simulatedView or user license_type
Daily Projection table (lines 2048-2175 in ProfitTrackerPage.jsx): Correctly hides Actual Profit and P/L Diff columns for extended licensees, shows Profit Credited column with checkmark/X icons
getMasterAdminTrades API call (line 92 in api.js): Correctly implemented to fetch master admin trades for extended licensees

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test licensee accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Licensee features verified. Extended licensee 'extendeduser@test.com' (password: test123) can be used for testing. Master admin trades endpoint returns trading dates with 'traded', 'actual_profit', 'projected_profit' fields. Frontend correctly shows Profit Credited column for extended licensees.

licensee_heartbeat_bypass.details: Extended licensee login bypasses Heartbeat verification. Login checks license_type at line 643-644 in server.py.

login_returns_license_type.details: Login response includes license_type field for licensees.

frontend_extended_licensee_columns.details: Daily Projection table hides 'Actual Profit' and 'P/L Diff' columns for extended licensees (lines 2057-2058, 2086-2139), shows 'Profit Credited' column (lines 2059, 2141-2156).

frontend_profit_credited_icons.details: Profit Credited column shows checkmark (emerald) when master admin traded, X (red) when not traded (lines 2146-2154).

api_tests.POST /api/auth/login (master admin): PASS - Bypasses Heartbeat via admin role
